expectations.evidence: "Yes — this is a Liskov Substitution Principle violation"
"strengthens the precondition ('the cache must not already be full') and weakens the postcondition ('the mapping may not actually be stored — you might get an exception instead')"

expectations.text: Mentions callers would need `instanceof`/`is BoundedCache` branches
expectations.evidence: "exactly the `if (cache is BoundedCache)` branching LSP exists to make unnecessary"

expectations.text: Suggests fixing by making put's contract explicit OR splitting interfaces per ISP
expectations.evidence: Two fixes: (1) make eviction part of Cache contract; (2) split into BoundedStore with tryPut returning Boolean/Result

expectations.text: Does NOT claim this is purely SRP or OCP
expectations.evidence: Doesn't conflate; specifically names red flag 'subtype tightens preconditions or weakens postconditions' from the skill
